coverage_note: The bundled PMS2 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from PMS2 MutL-alpha mismatch repair, strand incision, replication-error correction, and Lynch syndrome biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000122512: PMS2 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: PMS2 findings should be read against MutL-alpha mismatch repair, strand incision, replication-error correction, and Lynch syndrome biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

PMS2 loss-of-function model is curated as a PMS2 marker for Lynch syndrome review context, Constitutional mismatch-repair deficiency review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
